meaning: Ha Meem (special letters that begin this chapter)
the sending down (subject of this ayah)
The Mighty One (a name of Allah in this ayah, connected to الحكيم)
and in (location in خَلْقِكُمْ - your creation)
a creature (with emphasis on continuous movement)
they are becoming/remaining certain (referring to people who reflect on Allah's signs)
of the night (part of وَٱخْتِلٰفِ ٱلَّيْلِ - the alternation of the night)
and the daytime (possessed by/connected to what follows)
the sky (possessed by or following something)
and then he gave life (to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)
the earth (object being brought to life in فَأَحْيَا)
its death (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
signs, miracles (subject of this part of the verse)
for a people (who use their minds)
they use reason (referring to those who reflect on Allah's signs)
that (feminine, pointing to something far away) (refers to ءَايٰتُ)
upon you (being addressed in نَتْلُوهَا - we recite it)
with the truth/reality (نَتْلُوهَا - we recite it)
a speech/narrative (that comes after اللَّهِ وَءَايٰتِهِۦ)
it is being recited (verses of ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ)
then (after hearing Allah's verses being recited to him)
he persists stubbornly (subject of يَسْمَعُ - he hears)
arrogantly (describes how he persists in يُصِرُّ)
as if (he did not hear it)
he hears it (referring to ءَايٰتِ - verses)
so announce to him! (as a command)
and when (connects this conditional clause to what came before)
for them (who will have عَذَابٌ مُّهِينٌ)
behind them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
Hell (as the subject of what comes after)
he makes sufficient (subject of this verb is Allah)
away from them/about them (object of يُغْنِى - 'will not avail')
that which (refers to what they earned)
and for them (connected to عَذَابٌ - punishment)
a punishment (subject of لَهُمْ - they have)
he thoroughly made (the sea) serve (for your benefit)
for you all (connects to سَخَّرَ - subjected)
so that it (feminine) may flow (referring to ٱلْفُلْكُ - the ship)
the ship (subject of تَجْرِىَ - it sails)
in it (referring to ٱلْبَحْرَ - the sea)
by His command (describes how the ships sail)
and so that you all may seek (connected to لِتَجْرِىَ)
and so that you all may (do تَشْكُرُونَ)
you all thank (referring to multiple people being addressed in this ayah)
and He made (something) serve (connected to previous ayah)
for you all (object of سَخَّرَ - subjected)
and what (that is in الْأَرْضِ/the earth)
in/within (referring to what is in ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)
all together (describing how something was done)
from it/him (referring to what is in the heavens and earth mentioned in جَمِيعًا)
indeed/verily (emphasizes فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ that follows)
surely there are signs (connected to يَتَفَكَّرُونَ)
for those who (who will يَغْفِرُوا forgive)
the days (object of يَجْزِىَ - to recompense)
so that he may reward (connected to يَغْفِرُوا - they should forgive)
a people (object of يَجْزِىَ - to recompense)
with what/because of what (connects to يَكْسِبُونَ - they earn)
and whoever (connects to previous statement about good deeds)
then upon her/it (referring to the evil deed mentioned in أَسَآءَ)
then (connecting فَعَلَيْهَا with إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْجَعُونَ)
your (all of you) Lord (the subject of تُرْجَعُونَ)
you (all) are returned (to رَبِّكُمْ - your Lord)
Israel (proper name meaning 'one who struggles with God')
and the wisdom, and the judgment
and we provided them with sustenance (referring to بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ)
and we greatly favored them (referring to بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ - Children of Israel)
the worlds/realms (referring to all creation) (object of على)
clear proofs/signs (object of وَءَاتَيْنٰهُم/We gave them)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
came to them (subject of knowledge in this ayah)
out of transgression (describes how they differed in اختلفوا)
between them (referring to those who differed)
between them (referring to those who differed)
on the day (when Allah will judge between them)
the resurrection (on the Day of Judgment)
they were (referring to the people who differed/disagreed)
in it (referring to what they differed about)
we made you (object of عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍ - upon a way/path)
you (don't) follow (the desires of those who don't know)
indeed they (subject of لَن يُغْنُوا - will not avail)
they will make free from need (negated by لَن)
away from you/concerning you (object of يُغْنُوا - they will not avail)
and indeed (connects to ٱلظَّالِمِينَ - the wrongdoers)
some of them (referring to الظَّالِمِينَ - the wrongdoers)
close protector/guardian (of الْمُتَّقِينَ - those who are mindful of Allah)
the people who protect themselves (from wrong) (object of وَلِىُّ - guardian)
and they did/performed (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)
with/by the truth (describing how Allah created)
and so that she/it is compensated (connected to كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ - every soul)
a soul/self (with a small م below)
she gained (referring to نَفْسٍۭ which is feminine)
then have you seen/considered? (asking about مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ - the one who takes)
and he made him go astray
upon, on, over (preposition connecting to سَمْعِهِۦ - his hearing)
and he sealed (connected to وَأَضَلَّهُ - and He led him astray)
and his heart (acted upon by خَتَمَ)
and he made/placed (connected to وَخَتَمَ - and he sealed)
a covering/veil (object being placed on بَصَرِهِۦ - his sight)
he guides him (object of who will guide him)
so will they not? (asks why they don't take heed, referring to تَذَكَّرُونَ)
our life (as the subject of هِىَ)
and we live (connected to نَمُوتُ - we die)
the time/fate (which they claim destroys us)
for/to them (refers to those who deny in this ayah)
with/by that (referring to what was just mentioned)
except (what follows in this ayah excludes حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنْيَا from other possibilities)
you all were (past tense, masculine plural)
He (Allah) gives life to you all
he causes you all to die (object of يُحْيِيكُمْ)
the resurrection (connected to يَوْمِ - day of)
in it (referring to يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ - Day of Resurrection)
and to/for Allah (connected to مُلْكُ which follows)
and the earth (connected to مُلْكُ/dominion in previous ayah)
and on the day (when تَقُومُ happens)
the Hour (as the subject of تَقُومُ - stands/occurs)
on that day (when the Hour is established)
he loses/will lose (subject of يَوْمَئِذٍ - on that day)
the ones who make things false (subject of يَخْسَرُ)
a community/nation (being called in this ayah)
a community/nation (being described in كُلَّ أُمَّةٍ)
her book (referring to each nation's record of deeds)
you (all) are being given what is due
he speaks clearly (about كِتٰبُنَا - our record)
we record/copy (what كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ - you used to do)
what (that which you used to do)
you all work/act/do (referring to the disbelievers being addressed)
then as for (connects to previous statement)
and they did/worked (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)
so he makes them enter (into رَحْمَتِهِ)
and as for (introduces contrast with previous statement)
they rejected/disbelieved (those who are mentioned in الَّذِينَ)
Then did not (questioning the past negation)
you are (in the phrase 'were not my verses...')
and the Hour (referring to Judgment Day)
you all said (in response to being told about Allah's promise and the Hour)
we know (in response to قِيلَ - it was said)
the Hour (subject of لَا رَيْبَ فِيهَا)
and he became apparent (subject of يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ)
for them/to them (receiving what became apparent in بَدَا)
and surrounded/encompassed (them in مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ)
they were (referring to those who mocked)
with him/it (referring to what they used to mock)
they mock/ridicule (referring to the disbelievers in وَحَاقَ بِهِم)
and it was said (connected to نَنسَىٰكُمْ - we will forget you)
the day (object of قِيلَ/it was said)
we will forget you all (كَمَا نَسِيتُمْ - just as you forgot)
just as (connects to نَسِيتُمْ - you forgot)
you all forgot (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in this ayah)
your (plural) day (object of نَنسَىٰكُمْ - we will forget you)
this (pointing to something in the ayah)
and your (all) place of shelter/refuge (connected to نَنسَىٰكُمْ - We will forget you)
because you all (connects to اتَّخَذْتُمْ - you all took)
the life (worldly life in this ayah)
so today (object of what happens next in يُخْرَجُونَ)
they are made to exit/are expelled
they are asked to make amends
so/then for Allah (connected to الْحَمْدُ - praise)
and [by] the Lord of (connected to السَّمٰوٰتِ)
of the earth (possessed by رَبِّ - Lord of)
The Mighty (as a name/attribute of Allah)
